overview: GEMORA GLOBAL is a B2B, mobile-first international website for a luxury imitation jewellery manufacturer and exporter from Jaipur, India. Features 30+ SEO landing pages, a full admin panel for product/content management, and aggressive SEO targeting wholesalers, boutiques, retailers, and international buyers globally.
features: Kanhai Jewels-inspired B2B redesign with clean white/navy/gold look
Full-width hero slider with promotional strip
4-6 column product grid with MOQ badges, hover zoom, and quick-view popup
New Arrivals and Trending sections on homepage
WebP auto-conversion for all admin image uploads via Canvas API
Admin upload fix: storage gateway always uses https://blob.caffeine.ai
30+ SEO landing pages with FAQ schema and LocalBusiness schema
3 new Jaipur-specific SEO pages for competitive advantage over kanhaijewels.com
hreflang tags on all international market pages
Backend migration from vendored to library packages
Full admin panel: products, gallery, blog, catalogue, orders, inquiries, testimonials
